testcase.name: test_closing_math
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_financial.py:267: in test_closing_math assert v_match[0]["profit"] == 9000 E assert 8500.0 == 9000

testcase.name: test_full_e2e_revert_and_lost_sale

failure.message: requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='auto-commerce-lab.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /api/lost-sales (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(<HTTPSConnection(host='auto-commerce-lab.preview.emergentagent.com', port=443) at 0xf9de1ed4c850>, 'Connection to auto-commerce-lab.preview.emergentagent.com timed out. (connect timeout=20)'))
